nasb.text: Then he prepared an inner sanctuary within the house in order to place there the ark of the covenant of the Lord.

esv.text: The inner sanctuary he prepared in the innermost part of the house, to set there the ark of the covenant of the Lord.

cnv.text: 他在殿中預備了內殿，好把耶和華的約櫃安放在那裡。

ccb.text: 殿的至圣所用来安放耶和华的约柜。
